mainHeading: AYUSH Herbal Product License & Registration in India

introduction.heading: Introduction and Its Compliance
body: AYUSH stands for Ayurveda, Yoga & Naturopathy, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy. The AYUSH License is issued by the Ministry of AYUSH, Government of India, for the manufacturing and marketing of traditional Indian systems of medicine, including Ayurveda, Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy as well as Herbal Products which is a mandatory requirement of law. A special ministry for AYUSH was created by the Central Government in the year 2014 and was followed by the State Governments. Under this ministry the rules for making, selling, promoting exporting AYUSH products have been laid. Any individual or company that wishes to produce or distribute AYUSH products must obtain a license from the respective State AYUSH Department.

Professionals Law Private Limited offers complete assistance in acquiring AYUSH licenses, ensuring full compliance with applicable laws, including infrastructure setup, documentation, regulatory inspections and necessary approvals.

whyNeeded.heading: Why It Is Needed
body: The demand for Ayurvedic and herbal wellness products has increased exponentially in recent years, both in domestic as well as in international markets. An AYUSH license is legally required to ensure that the products meet traditional formulation standards and safety requirements. It enables businesses to manufacture, market and export AYUSH based products, while ensuring public health and consumer confidence. Additionally, it also allows participation in government tenders and ecommerce platforms where licensing is mandatory.

body.title: Legal Authorization for Herbal Product Manufacturing
body.description: An AYUSH License legally permits the manufacturer to produce and distribute herbal, Ayurvedic and Unani products while staying compliant with Indian regulations.

body.title: Access to Global Markets
body.description: With an AYUSH License, businesses can export products internationally, as the certification is recognized by many countries interested in traditional Indian medicine.

body.title: Increased Market Trust
body.description: Consumers trust licensed herbal and Ayurvedic brands more, improving brand reputation and marketability.

body.title: Government Scheme Eligibility
body.description: Licensed AYUSH businesses are eligible for financial grants, R&D support and incentives under the AYUSH Mission and similar schemes.

body.title: Competitive Advantage
body.description: Obtaining an AYUSH license adds value to the brand and gives a competitive edge in the booming herbal product sector.

criteria: The applicant must be a registered company, LLP or proprietorship with manufacturing or marketing intent.
Manufacturing premises must meet Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) prescribed under Schedule T of the Drugs and Cosmetics Act.
The business must employ a qualified AYUSH practitioner or pharmacist, such as BAMS, BUMS or equivalent degree holders.
For marketing companies (loan license), a tie-up with a GMP-certified manufacturer is required.

documents: Company registration certificate or partnership deed
Identity and address proof of the directors/partners/proprietor
Site plan/layout of the manufacturing unit
Qualification and appointment letter of the technical person
List of machinery and manufacturing equipment
NOC from the Pollution Control Board (if required)
GMP and COPP (if applying for export)

body.description: Manufacturing, loan license or contract manufacturing based on business needs.
Establish or tie-up with a GMP-compliant manufacturing unit.
Gather necessary documents including technical personnel details and site layout.
Submit application online or offline to the State AYUSH Licensing Authority.
The authority inspects the premises for hygiene, equipment, personnel and compliance.
After approval, the AYUSH license is issued with a unique license number.

body.title: Unauthorized Manufacturing or Sale
body.description: Imprisonment for up to 2 years under the Drugs and Cosmetics Act.

body.title: Product Recalls
body.description: Product recalls and damage to business reputation.

body.title: Manufacturing License
body.description: Typically granted within 45 to 60 working days after application and inspection.

body.title: Loan or Marketing License
body.description: May be processed faster, within 30 to 45 working days, provided the contract manufacturer is pre-approved.

body.question: What is an AYUSH License?
body.answer: It is a mandatory license required to manufacture or market Ayurvedic, Unani, Siddha or herbal health products in India.

body.question: Who issues the AYUSH License?
body.answer: The license is issued by the State Licensing Authority under the Ministry of AYUSH.

body.question: Is a manufacturing unit mandatory?
body.answer: Yes, for a manufacturing license. However, for a marketing company, you can partner with an approved manufacturer and apply under a loan license.

body.question: What is GMP in AYUSH Licensing?
body.answer: Good Manufacturing Practices ensure that manufacturing premises maintain hygiene, equipment standards and trained personnel.

body.question: Can I export AYUSH products with this license?
body.answer: Yes. You must also obtain a Certificate of Pharmaceutical Product (CoPP) and comply with the import regulations of the destination country.

body.question: Is AYUSH license valid for cosmetics and personal care?
body.answer: Only if the products are based on Ayurvedic or Unani formulations. Pure cosmetics fall under separate licensing.

body.question: Do I need a pharmacist for AYUSH license?
body.answer: You need a qualified AYUSH medical practitioner or technical person, not a conventional pharmacist.

body.question: How long is the AYUSH license valid?
body.answer: Most AYUSH licenses are valid for 5 years, subject to compliance and renewal before expiration.

body.question: Can Professionals Law help me get the AYUSH license anywhere in India?
body.answer: Absolutely. Professionals Law Private Limited offers end-to-end support across all Indian states for AYUSH and other health sector licensing.
